headline: Israel launches new military escalation in Lebanon
description: Under pressure from Washington not to attack Beirut – where, according to Israel, the bulk of Hezbollah's military capabilities are located – the Israeli army is instead intensifying its operations in southern Lebanon.

headline: Revealed: KTM's secretly derestricted and highly polluting motorcycles
From a kidnapping in France to crypto wallet in Venezuela: Inside a ransom laundering scheme
'It was 30°C in the classrooms this afternoon': France experiences its hottest day in May on record
description: Temperatures soared on Tuesday, reaching between 33 and 36°C across much of France, especially in the West, which was 10 to 15°C above seasonal norms. These are midsummer temperatures, even though summer has not yet begun.

headline: Gabriel Zucman and Emmanuel Saez, the two 'Frenchies' campaigning to tax California's billionaires
description: California's 250 billionaires have amassed staggering wealth while paying very little in taxes, French researchers Gabriel Zucman and Emmanuel Saez denounced in an op-ed for the New York Times. They support a proposal for a one-time 5% wealth tax, which will be put to a referendum on November 3.

headline: Documentary follows Greta Thunberg and Swedish climate activists' hope and despair
description: For seven years, filmmaker Helena Molin followed a dozen teenagers who helped found the Fridays for Future movement in 2018. The resulting documentary has been met with critical acclaim.

headline: In Gaza, 'the disappearance of almost all Hamas leaders paves the way for the emergence of a new generation'
description: With negotiations at a standstill, internal elections underway and the elimination of Hamas leaders by Israel, political scientist Leïla Seurat, a specialist on the Palestinian question, discusses the prospects for the Islamist movement in the Gaza Strip.

The network of US pilots helping women seek abortion care
description: Responding to increasingly strict anti-abortion laws in Texas, a non-profit organization offers free flights to neighboring states. The group also assists individuals seeking gender-affirming care.

headline: How China uses influencers to polish its image
description: Chongqing, a futuristic Chinese city, has caught the eye of influencers and bloggers. Beijing, meanwhile, welcomes new visitors, often unaware of the geopolitical and ideological currents running beneath their social media posts.

headline: Pope Leo XIV calls for 'disarming AI'
description: In his first encyclical, titled 'Magnifica humanitas,' the pope warns about the impacts of artificial intelligence, which he described as an anthropological challenge to humanity, stepping directly into current debates over the use of the technology.
